mapper.insert: insert tb_cs_meeting_result (start, end, text, meeting_speaker_id, meeting_seq) value(#{startDouble}, #{endDouble}, #{text}, #{meetingSpeakerId}, #{meeting_seq});
mapper.select:
select tt.seq as seq , tt.remark , tt.subject , tt.lang , tt.created_at as createdAt , tt.updated_at as updatedAt , tt.deleted_at as deletedAt , tt.trashed_at as trashedAt , tt.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , tt.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , tt.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , iu.tc_name as tcName , tt.upload_type as uploadType , ( select count(distinct t.seq) from tb_cs_meeting t LEFT JOIN tb_cs_info_user iuu ON t.tc_user_seq = iuu.seq
left join tb_cs_meeting_result TCMR on t.seq = TCMR.meeting_seq
WHERE t.seq != -1 and t.deleted_at is null AND t.trashed_at is not null AND (t.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )) AND t.error_message is null
AND t.tc_user_seq = #{securityMember.member.username}
AND (t.subject like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND (t.tc_name like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
) as hiddenCount from tb_cs_meeting tt LEFT JOIN tb_cs_info_user iu ON tt.tc_user_seq = iu.seq
left join tb_cs_meeting_result tcm on tt.seq = tcm.meeting_seq
WHERE tt.seq != -1 and tt.deleted_at is null AND tt.trashed_at is not null AND (tt.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )) AND tt.error_message is null
AND tt.tc_user_seq = #{securityMember.member.username}
AND (tt.subject like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND (tt.tc_name like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
group by tt.seq order by tt.created_at desc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}

select tt.seq as seq , tt.remark , tt.subject , tt.lang , tt.created_at as createdAt , tt.updated_at as updatedAt , tt.deleted_at as deletedAt , tt.trashed_at as trashedAt , tt.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , tt.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , tt.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , tt.error_message as errorMessage , iu.tc_name as tcName , tt.upload_type as uploadType , ( select count(distinct t.seq) from tb_cs_meeting t LEFT JOIN tb_cs_info_user iuu ON t.tc_user_seq = iuu.seq
left join tb_cs_meeting_result TCMR on t.seq = TCMR.MEETING_seq
WHERE t.seq != -1 and t.deleted_at is null AND t.trashed_at is null AND (t.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )) AND t.error_message is null
WHERE t.seq != -1 and t.deleted_at is null AND t.remark = 1 AND t.trashed_at is null AND (t.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )) AND t.error_message is null
AND t.tc_user_seq = #{securityMember.member.username}
AND (t.subject like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND (iuu.tc_name like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
) as hiddenCount from tb_cs_meeting tt LEFT JOIN tb_cs_info_user iu ON tt.tc_user_seq = iu.seq
left join tb_cs_meeting_result tcm on tt.seq = tcm.MEETING_seq
WHERE tt.seq != -1 and tt.deleted_at is null AND tt.trashed_at is null AND (tt.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )) AND tt.error_message is null
WHERE tt.seq != -1 and tt.deleted_at is null AND tt.remark = 1 AND tt.trashed_at is null AND (tt.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )) AND tt.error_message is null
AND tt.tc_user_seq = #{securityMember.member.username}
AND (tt.subject like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND (iu.tc_name like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
group by tt.seq order by tt.created_at desc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}

select seq , subject , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as created_at , DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as updated_at , DATE_FORMAT(deleted_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as deleted_at , DATE_FORMAT(trashed_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as trashed_at , time_duration_ms , ifnull(lang, '') as lang , file_org_nm , file_new_nm , ifnull(summary, '') as summary , ifnull(summary2, '') as summary2 , ifnull(summary3, '') as summary3 , ifnull(summary_id, '') as summaryId , ifnull(summary_id2, '') as summaryId2 , ifnull(summary_id3, '') as summaryId3 , ifnull(summary_status, '') as summaryStatus , ifnull(summary_status2, '') as summaryStatus2 , ifnull(summary_status3, '') as summaryStatus3 from tb_cs_meeting WHERE seq = #{seq}
mapper.update:
update tb_cs_meeting
set trashed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
set trashed_at = NULL
where seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_cs_transcription WHERE meeting_seq = #{seq} AND ( use_yn = 'Y' OR data_id != '' OR train_text IS NOT NULL )

select m.seq , m.file_org_nm , m.file_new_nm , m.file_conv_nm , m.subject , ( select count(distinct t.seq) from tb_cs_transcription t WHERE t.meeting_seq = #{seq} ) as tr_count from tb_cs_meeting m WHERE m.seq = #{seq}

SELECT seq , file_org_nm , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at , DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updated_at , DATE_FORMAT(deleted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as deleted_at , DATE_FORMAT(trashed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as trashed_at , file_new_nm , file_conv_nm FROM tb_cs_meeting WHERE seq != -1 AND created_at < TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{term} DAY ) ) AND deleted_at IS null ORDER BY created_at
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_cs_meeting
summary_id = #{summId}, summary_status = 'PENDING'
summary_id2 = #{summId}, summary_status2 = 'PENDING'
summary_id3 = #{summId}, summary_status3 = 'PENDING'
WHERE seq = #{seq}

UPDATE tb_cs_meeting
summary = #{summary}, summary_status = 'SUCCESS'
summary2 = #{summary}, summary_status2 = 'SUCCESS'
summary3 = #{summary}, summary_status3 = 'SUCCESS'
WHERE seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: select seq as seq , subject , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , deleted_at as deletedAt , trashed_at as trashedAt , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , file_new_nm as fileNewNm , file_conv_nm as fileConvNm , remark , file_size_bytes as fileSizeBytes , tc_user_seq as tcUserSeq from tb_cs_meeting WHERE seq > 0 AND created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY ) and seq >= #{from} and seq <= #{to} AND deleted_at is null AND trashed_at is null order by created_at
select count(*) as count ,(sum(time_duration_ms)/ count(*)) as avgTimeDurationMs,(sum(file_size_bytes)) as avgFileSizeBytes from tb_cs_meeting WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} and #{endDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_cs_meeting_config ( config_name, config_value, use_yn,detail ) VALUES ( #{settingTitle},#{settingValue},#{settingUseYn},#{settingDetail});
mapper.select: select config_name as configName , config_value as configValue , use_yn AS useYn , detail from tb_cs_meeting_config where config_name = #{settingTitle}

select config_name as configName , config_value as configValue , use_yn AS useYn , detail , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt , DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updatedAt from tb_cs_meeting_config order by updatedAt DESC
mapper.update: update tb_cs_meeting set deleted_at = current_timestamp, update_at = current_timestamp where seq = #{seq}
update tb_cs_meeting set deleted_at = current_timestamp, update_at = current_timestamp, removed_at = current_timestamp where seq = #{seq}
update tb_cs_meeting set trashed_at = #{trashedAt}, update_at = current_timestamp where seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: select a.seq as seq, a.start as start, a.end as end, a.text as text, a.speaker as speaker, a.meeting_seq as meetingSeq, a.created_at as createdAt, a.meeting_speaker_id as meetingSpeakerId, a.updated_at as updatedAt, b.name as name from tb_cs_meeting_result a, tb_cs_meeting_speaker b where a.meeting_seq = #{seq} and a.meeting_seq = b.seq order by a.start asc
select meeting_speaker_id as meetingSpeakerId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, name as name, seq as seq from tb_cs_meeting_speaker where seq = #{seq}
select meeting_speaker_id as meetingSpeakerId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, name as name, seq as seq from tb_cs_meeting_speaker where seq = #{seq} and name = #{name}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_cs_meeting_speaker ( name, seq, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{seq}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
